name: buddyhub
description: Experimental native visual customization tooling for the official Claude Code Buddy.

color_green.title: Color: Green
color_green.description: Use the Green accent. Turn on at most one BuddyHub color toggle at a time.

color_orange.title: Color: Orange
color_orange.description: Use the Orange accent. Turn on at most one BuddyHub color toggle at a time.

color_blue.title: Color: Blue
color_blue.description: Use the Blue accent. Turn on at most one BuddyHub color toggle at a time.

color_pink.title: Color: Pink
color_pink.description: Use the Pink accent. Turn on at most one BuddyHub color toggle at a time.

color_purple.title: Color: Purple
color_purple.description: Use the Purple accent. Turn on at most one BuddyHub color toggle at a time.

color_red.title: Color: Red
color_red.description: Use the Red accent. Turn on at most one BuddyHub color toggle at a time.

color_black.title: Color: Black
color_black.description: Use the Black accent. Turn on at most one BuddyHub color toggle at a time.

nickname.title: Nickname
nickname.description: Optional display nickname for the official Buddy surfaces. Leave blank to keep the official name.
